title: Create, copy, move and rename deterministic misconception check

publication.changeSummary: Deterministic misconception item for Create, copy, move and rename; blocked from formal exams until independent human review.

items.title: Create, copy, move and rename: correct the failure model
items.prompt: Which statement correctly resolves this documented beginner mistake? Move and copy are interchangeable because both make the file appear at the destination.

examEligibility.rationale: The deterministic answer and rubric are AI-assisted draft content awaiting independent human approval.

hints: Compare both options with the canonical model, declared boundary, and observable evidence in the lesson.

feedback.correct: Correct. Copy preserves the source while move changes its location; verify both endpoints and repository status before treating the operation as complete.
feedback.incorrect: The selected statement preserves the documented misconception. Copy preserves the source while move changes its location; verify both endpoints and repository status before treating the operation as complete.

criteria.description: Selects the source-aligned correction for Create, copy, move and rename instead of the documented misconception.

privateAuthorNotes: Human reviewer must verify the correction against the cited source and ensure the misconception option is plausible without reinforcing it.

options.text: Copy preserves the source while move changes its location; verify both endpoints and repository status before treating the operation as complete.
Move and copy are interchangeable because both make the file appear at the destination.

answer.explanation: Copy preserves the source while move changes its location; verify both endpoints and repository status before treating the operation as complete.
